primary.description: Solid primary color button with hover elevation and glow
primary.styles: background-color: var(--color-primary); color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; hover: { background-color: var(--color-primary-hover); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(48, 81, 255, 0.3); }

secondary.description: Ghost button with custom border and hover light background opacity
secondary.styles: background-color: transparent; color: var(--text-primary); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; hover: { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border-color: var(--text-secondary); }

sidebar_action.description: Outline button for creating actions inside the sidebar
sidebar_action.styles: background-color: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); color: var(--text-primary); padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; hover: { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); border-color: var(--text-muted); }

upgrade.description: Bold primary button used for premium conversion inside sidebar footer
upgrade.styles: background-color: var(--color-primary); color: #ffffff; border: none; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; hover: { background-color: var(--color-primary-hover); }

landing_login.description: Semi-transparent border button for header navigation
landing_login.styles: border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); background-color: transparent; color: var(--text-primary); padding: 8px 24px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; hover: { border-color: var(--text-primary); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); }

storage.description: Overview grid cards containing status details and horizontal progress bar
storage.styles: background-color: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; transition: all 0.2s ease; hover: { background-color: var(--bg-card-hover); transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); }

folder.description: Standard list grid folder item with visual folder icons
folder.styles: background-color: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 18px; hover: { background-color: var(--bg-card-hover); transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); }

file.description: Files grid item with upper preview container and lower details bar
file.styles: background-color: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; hover: { background-color: var(--bg-card-hover); transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); } preview: { height: 120px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02) } info: { padding: 12px 16px }

suggestion.description: Quick-access suggestion cards with Unsplash image thumbnail and lower metadata bar
suggestion.styles: background-color: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; hover: { background-color: var(--bg-card-hover); transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); } thumbnail: { height: 120px; hover: scale(1.05) }

search.styles: background-color: var(--bg-input); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px 10px 42px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-primary); transition: all 0.2s ease; focus: { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-primary); }

custom.description: Sleek custom checkbox replacing native element
custom.styles: width: 18px; height: 18px; border: 2px solid var(--text-muted); border-radius: 4px; checked: { background: var(--color-primary); border-color: var(--color-primary); indicator: white checkmark 4x9px rotated 45deg }

layout.app_structure: Flex container of 100vh width with sticky Sidebar (260px) and flex-1 main scrollable content panel.
layout.dashboard_sections: Header pill + action row, followed by Overview Storage grid (4 columns), Suggestions grid (4 columns), and Recent Files table (custom rows with active row styling).
